repo.description: MonGPT is the marketing site for an AI chat + voice customer support agent targeting Asian markets with multi-language support (Hindi, Tamil, Chinese, Malay, Japanese, Thai, and more). The site is a static Next.js export on Cloudflare Pages, featuring locale-aware landing pages, a docs hub, a pricing page, and 26+ free SEO tools that drive lead generation via a footer link mesh.
repo.framework: Next.js 16 (static export) · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS v4 · Cloudflare Pages

cards.title: Add SSRF guards and size limits to demo endpoints
cards.rationale: Scrape and parse-file endpoints accept arbitrary URLs and files with zero validation client-side.
bullets: Validate URL scheme/host in ChatWithSource loadUrl
Enforce max file size in ConverterTool onFile
Add client-side rate limiting to all /api/demo calls

cards.title: Add unit tests for markdown converters and i18n utils
cards.rationale: Core conversion logic in toMarkdown.ts and locale routing have zero test coverage.
bullets: Test csvToMarkdown and jsonToMarkdown edge cases
Add vitest config — jsdom already in devDeps

cards.title: Add mobile navigation menu to header
cards.rationale: Nav links are hidden on mobile with no hamburger fallback, losing conversion paths.
bullets: Add hamburger toggle button visible below md breakpoint
Slide-down panel with all nav links and CTA

cards.title: Add competitor comparison pages for SEO
cards.rationale: Chatbase and Tidio rank for 'MonGPT vs X' queries; MonGPT has no comparison pages.
bullets: Feature and price comparison table component

cards.title: Add interactive widget customizer page
cards.rationale: Let visitors preview and tweak widget styling before signup — visually demoable and converts.
bullets: Color picker for brand and bubble colors
Live preview using DemoWidget with custom config

cards.title: Add customer testimonials and case studies page
cards.rationale: No social proof exists anywhere on the site; competitors feature testimonials prominently.
bullets: Testimonials grid with customer logos and quotes
Case study cards with before/after metrics
Add to Footer product column and sitemap
